evals.prompt: /script How MCP Servers Actually Work — I want a deep dive explainer covering the protocol, transport layers, and real-world use cases with Claude Desktop
evals.expected_output: Generates script.json with 6-phase pipeline output including research, hook variants, scene plan, and full narration

evals.prompt: /video HowMCPWorks — the script.json is already in src/HowMCPWorks/script.json, generate the Remotion code
evals.expected_output: Reads script.json, computes durations, generates Remotion code + manifest.json + transcript.json

evals.prompt: make a video about the latest AI agent frameworks this week, cover CrewAI, AutoGen, and LangGraph
evals.expected_output: Triggers video-director in /script mode, detects 'news' type, runs research phase

evals.prompt: I need a script for a tutorial on setting up a Next.js 15 project with App Router, I want it to be around 5 minutes with code examples
evals.expected_output: Triggers video-director in /script mode, detects 'tutorial' type

evals.prompt: /script --from-idea 2026-04-01 Claude Code vs Cursor — use the competitive analysis from my idea.md to angle the hook
evals.expected_output: Reads idea.md from productions/2026-04-01/, carries forward sources and gaps
